reference: Hi there, I am constantly experiencing cold and flu symptoms with no relief for over the last two years or more. To put it shortly, I am sick eleven months out of twelve. I have been using steroids, inhalers, sprays, and antibiotics—everything. The doctor says it might be allergies or possibly sinus issues, but not one medication has worked for me yet. Lately, I have started having fevers along with it, and I feel very ill and fed up with being constantly sick. I am desperate for help to breathe normally and to be free from a runny nose and sore throat all the time.
text: Hi there. I am constantly experiencing cold and flu symptoms with no relief for over the last two years or more. To put it shortly, I am sick 11 months out of 12. I have been using steroids, inhalers, sprays, and antibiotics. Everything. It says it might be allergies or possibly sinus issues, but not one medication has worked for me yet. Lately, I have started having fevers along with it, and I feel very ill and fed up with being constantly sick. I am desperate for help to breathe normally and to be free from a runny nose and sore throat all the time.
